en: You can have up to 6 units in your squad
es: Puedes tener hasta 6 unidades en tu escuadrón

en: After the battle, the leaders retire to their quarters to rest.
es: Después de la batalla, las líderes se retiran a sus cuarteles para descansar.

en:
All but one units have been disabled.

Swap your other units around by dragging said unit over them.

Swap repeatedly until you can line up your units for a pincer.
es:
Se han deshabilitado todas las unidades, excepto una.

Empuja tus otras unidades arrastrando la unidad habilitada sobre ellas.

Empuja repetidamente hasta que puedas alinear tus unidades para cercar al enemigo.

en: Greaves of Clay Stomping On A Spirit’s Head Forever
es: Grebas de Arcilla Pisoteando Eternamente la Cabeza de un Espíritu

en: You died on a Tuesday, mid-sentence.
es: You died on a Tuesday, mid-sentence.

en: The road to the Spire runs through the outer wards.
es: The road to the Spire runs through the outer wards.

en: Margin Hall is a drowned transit hub, three levels down.
es: Margin Hall is a drowned transit hub, three levels down.

en: A clinic on the ward line wipes the memory of anyone who badges in.
es: A clinic on the ward line wipes the memory of anyone who badges in.

en: Every indexed street feeds the camera mesh.
es: Every indexed street feeds the camera mesh.

en: A whole district of the forgotten dead lives in the flooded dark.
es: A whole district of the forgotten dead lives in the flooded dark.

en: To go deeper, the band has to cross a catwalk one soul wide.
es: To go deeper, the band has to cross a catwalk one soul wide.

en: The tunnel opens into a server floor built out of the dead.
es: The tunnel opens into a server floor built out of the dead.

en: Deeper still: a floor where bodies are taken apart and built back into something that walks like...
es: Deeper still: a floor where bodies are taken apart and built back into something that walks like...

en: They wake an old process, idle so long the dust has dust.
es: They wake an old process, idle so long the dust has dust.

en: Something near the buried core has hooked the band and started reeling.
es: Something near the buried core has hooked the band and started reeling.

en: In the deepest null zone, the lights and the signal and the sync all fail at once.
es: In the deepest null zone, the lights and the signal and the sync all fail at once.

en: They run the deep Ward boss down and crash him.
es: They run the deep Ward boss down and crash him.

en: Then the floor of the world gives way.
es: Then the floor of the world gives way.

en: The Render Floor runs under the financial wards.
es: The Render Floor runs under the financial wards.

en: The network stops pretending it cannot see them.
es: The network stops pretending it cannot see them.

en: It becomes a running war in the stairwells.
es: It becomes a running war in the stairwells.

en: The truth opens a seam down the middle of them.
es: The truth opens a seam down the middle of them.

en: Cornered, with nothing left to spend, the band stops hiding what it is.
es: Cornered, with nothing left to spend, the band stops hiding what it is.

en: They climb back to a surface that looks exactly the same.
es: They climb back to a surface that looks exactly the same.

en: For the first time, the Conductor speaks to them directly.
es: For the first time, the Conductor speaks to them directly.

en: Off the index now, past the reach of any rule HARMONY wrote.
es: Off the index now, past the reach of any rule HARMONY wrote.

en: They take the war down to street level.
es: They take the war down to street level.

en: HARMONY does not just reap its stars.
es: HARMONY does not just reap its stars.

en: They push a flawless synthetic at the band.
es: They push a flawless synthetic at the band.

en: A partner everyone loved goes down the conveyor.
es: A partner everyone loved goes down the conveyor.

en: Compliance does not delete you all at once.
es: Compliance does not delete you all at once.

en: For one impossible season, Margin Hall stops hiding.
es: For one impossible season, Margin Hall stops hiding.

en: The offer does not come as a unit.
es: The offer does not come as a unit.

en: Soft Rain believes a thing can still be fixed from the inside.
es: Soft Rain believes a thing can still be fixed from the inside.

en: Badged and deployed, the band runs the Administration's hardest ops.
es: Badged and deployed, the band runs the Administration's hardest ops.

en: Triage is the one who keeps the count.
es: Triage is the one who keeps the count.

en: Committed, scattered, badged into the very machine that is reaping them, the band watches the...
es: Committed, scattered, badged into the very machine that is reaping them, the band watches the...

en: The Administration they crossed over to serve revokes their access between one gate and the next.
es: The Administration they crossed over to serve revokes their access between one gate and the next.

en: They reach the Render Floor a second time.
es: They reach the Render Floor a second time.

en: The Index speaks to the Auditor alone now.
es: The Index speaks to the Auditor alone now.

en: The table is rewriting itself in real time.
es: The table is rewriting itself in real time.

en: At the Index, the last move is yours.
es: At the Index, the last move is yours.
